phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso del mercato, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so del mer-KAH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is right here, straight ahead.

responses.english: It is right here, straight ahead.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trovano i bagni, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah-noh ee BAHN-yee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: In fondo a sinistra, vicino bar.
likely_response.pronunciation: EEN FOHN-doh AH see-NEE-strah vee-CHEE-noh BAHR
likely_response.translation_en: At the back on the left, near bar.

responses.english: At the back on the left, near bar.
responses.phonetic: EEN FOHN-doh AH see-NEE-strah vee-CHEE-noh BAHR
responses.french: In fondo a sinistra, vicino bar.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre il mercato, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah AH-preh eel mer-KAH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, il mercato è aperto oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, eel mer-KAH-toh eh ah-PEHR-toh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove posso mangiare arancini, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh POS-soh man-JAH-reh ah-ran-CHEE-nee, per fah-VOH-reh
